# V47 — Loop Contract Theatre

## Summary

Adds a public-safe browser-local demonstration of GoalOS as a loop institution: contract first, role separation, virtual disk state, restart, trace reading, proof scoring, harness reduction, Chronicle, and bottleneck exposure.

## Added

- `site/loop-contract-theatre.html`
- `site/assets/loop-contract-theatre.css`
- `site/assets/loop-contract-theatre.js`
- `data/loop-contract-theatre-demo.json`
- `schemas/loop-contract-theatre.schema.json`
- `docs/LOOP_CONTRACT_THEATRE_V47.md`
- `tests/loop-contract-theatre.test.mjs`
- `tools/loop-contract-theatre-v47-kernel.mjs`
- `tools/release-compatibility-harmonizer-v47.mjs`

## Boundaries preserved

No account, no form, no wallet, no token approval, no network request, no analytics, no cookies, no browser storage, no public transaction, no funds movement, and no production authority.
